description: Upload receipts, tag expenses, and bundle monthly reports on Zoho Expense from the terminal

auth_env_var_specs.name: ZOHO_EXPENSE_CLIENT_ID
auth_env_var_specs.description: OAuth client ID from api-console.zoho.in self-client

auth_env_var_specs.name: ZOHO_EXPENSE_CLIENT_SECRET
auth_env_var_specs.description: OAuth client secret from api-console.zoho.in self-client

auth_env_var_specs.name: ZOHO_EXPENSE_REFRESH_TOKEN
auth_env_var_specs.description: Long-lived refresh token issued after exchanging a 10-min authorization code

auth_env_var_specs.name: ZOHO_EXPENSE_ORGANIZATION_ID
auth_env_var_specs.description: Zoho Expense organization ID (sent as X-com-zoho-expense-organizationid header on every request)

novel_features.name: Invoice batch ingest
novel_features.description: Batch upload a folder of invoices to Zoho Expense, SHA256-dedup against the local store, poll autoscan in parallel, and auto-tag from learned merchant memory — the headline workflow for AI agents that ingest invoices from email.

novel_features.name: Merchant memory
novel_features.description: Build a local merchant→category/project/tag mapping from sync history; pre-fill tags on first sight of a new merchant.

novel_features.name: Merchant mapping training
novel_features.description: Train the local merchant→category mapping for future auto-tag (one merchant at a time, or bulk from a CSV).

novel_features.name: Receipt hash gate
novel_features.description: SHA256-hash incoming receipts at upload, refuse duplicates (use --force to override).

novel_features.name: Monthly close
novel_features.description: Bundle a month's unreported expenses into an expense report in one shot — flags still-processing autoscans, flags untagged items, creates the report, attaches, optionally submits.

novel_features.name: GST CGST/SGST split
novel_features.description: India-specific: parse an expense's tax_id and line items, compute CGST/SGST (intra-state) or IGST (inter-state) shares, emit the breakdown or update the expense.

novel_features.name: Untagged expense audit
novel_features.description: List expenses missing category_id or project_id; `--auto-fix` applies the merchant→tag memory map and PUTs back to Zoho.
